description: NO : WP-2026-004 AUTHOR :Kritika Sharma, Taniya Ghosh TITLE : Food, Headline, and Core Inflation: Horizon-Dependent Transmission in India ABSTRACT : Food price shocks are often treated as transitory and largely irrelevant for underlying inflation.
